patch.value: GH-634: successful global reinstall can remove the pm executable
A successful npm global install can be followed by manifest_missing and a missing pm executable while npm still reports @unbrained/pm-cli installed, leaving recovery dependent on another reinstall.

Global install publication keeps executable, bundle, and manifest generation coherent; manifest_missing recovery never removes the only executable; concurrent or interrupted install behavior has real temp-prefix tests; npm/global-prefix diagnostics provide an actionable safe retry

Install @unbrained/pm-cli@2026.7.21 globally, run a repository command, observe bundle_integrity_torn_install manifest_missing, then observe the pm executable missing while npm list still reports the package.
A successful install atomically exposes one coherent executable/bundle/manifest generation.
The package remained registered but the global pm executable disappeared until reinstall.
Every pm workflow is unavailable until the operator discovers and performs another reinstall.

value.author: codex-relationship-backfill-20260721
value.text: Duplicate check 2026-07-21: searched all statuses for GH-634,global install executable missing,manifest_missing,and bundle-integrity reinstall. Closed pm-wfvq and pm-pz7xtx own torn-generation diagnosis,but neither covers npm publication removing the executable after a reported successful install; this item records the distinct installer atomicity failure.
